title: rubus × benzonianus
intro: Rubus × benzonianus, also known as Ben's raspberry, is a hybrid raspberry plant that is a cross between the Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis species. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus × benzonianus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as arthritis, digestive problems, and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
